creator: CQG00620@nifty.ne.jp
text:
Created attachment 210984
A svn diff for japanese/ibus-anthy

(1) Fix DEPRECATED flag

(1.1) Remove EOLed Python 2.7 dependency

      Use Python 3.6+ and drop support for Python 2.7.  I've tested the patch
      with Python 3.6 and 3.7.  Unfortunately the depending port
      (textproc/ibus) still uses Python 2.7 at the moment.

(1.2) Update to the latest release

(2) Take maintainership
